---
title: 'Distortion (White Noise, Episode 1 (or Book 1?))'
date: '2023-11-29T07:32:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'White Noise'
---

<div><br /></div><h4 style="text-align: left;">Distortion (White Noise, Episode 1 (or Book 1?)) - Draft Elevator Pitch/Tagline</h4><div>
<div></div><blockquote><div>What if your apparent curse was your greatest gift, but embracing this truth came at the cost of a normal life?</div><div><br /></div><div>Major Theron 'Ash' Ashland, a medically retired USAF officer, grapples with PTSD after a paranormal science experiment goes awry.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>Seeking some semblance of normalcy, Ash's world is upended once more when he realizes his perceived curse – disruptive hallucinations – is a rare gift – the ability glimpse unseen realms and alternate dimensions.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>What will it cost him to know for sure?</div></blockquote><div></div><br /><br /><b>Working Draft Book Covers / Not Final&nbsp;<br /></b><br /><a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiJnHZnB_QVTxcXL5fJQ5kdETnihhKkNQf6TsO4OmYnqKJ8Srnm1aTFj8nI3GpfhVx1kZTcbqfRuh0D5PUpBRwn1eMuQrMeVbLLw7OgGW0fF-Z5y1ac7bEokn62ozn2Go_KwQBfbhexliXVzMW3riimlUCFuh9NUI49WB0CrpdMkNeG9FAsdAbKF-GDzlc/s400/Distortion%20Cover%20for%20White%20Noise%20(2018).jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em; text-align: center;"><img border="0" data-original-height="400" data-original-width="256" height="320" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiJnHZnB_QVTxcXL5fJQ5kdETnihhKkNQf6TsO4OmYnqKJ8Srnm1aTFj8nI3GpfhVx1kZTcbqfRuh0D5PUpBRwn1eMuQrMeVbLLw7OgGW0fF-Z5y1ac7bEokn62ozn2Go_KwQBfbhexliXVzMW3riimlUCFuh9NUI49WB0CrpdMkNeG9FAsdAbKF-GDzlc/s320/Distortion%20Cover%20for%20White%20Noise%20(2018).jpg" width="205" /></a><br />
<br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-ebook-3c763f474713.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em; text-align: center;"><img border="0" data-original-height="481" data-original-width="315" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-ebook-e22b2d6b0393.jpg" width="210" /></a>
